raw_response:
```json
{
  "rephrased_requirement": "Design and implement a secure, scalable, and accurate AI-powered document question-answering system, where users can upload files in supported formats (PDF, DOCX, TXT) and ask questions, receiving relevant and properly cited answers within a specified response latency of 2 seconds, with a retrieval accuracy of 90% and uptime expectation of 99.9%.",
  "functional_requirements": [
    "Users can upload documents in supported file formats (PDF, DOCX, TXT) with a maximum file size of 10MB.",
    "Users can ask questions related to the uploaded documents.",
    "The system provides relevant and properly cited answers to user questions, with a minimum of 2 citations per answer.",
    "The system supports a question-answer workflow, allowing users to ask follow-up questions based on previous answers.",
    "The system provides a search functionality to retrieve relevant documents based on user queries."
  ],
  "non_functional_requirements": [
    "Response latency: 2 seconds or less for 95% of user queries.",
    "Uptime expectation: 99.9% or higher, with a maximum of 1 hour of scheduled maintenance per week.",
    "Retrieval accuracy: 90% or higher, measured by the relevance of retrieved documents to user queries.",
    "Citation grounding quality: 95% or higher, measured by the accuracy of citations provided in answers."
  ],
  "security_requirements": [
    "Document access controls: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to ensure only authorized users can access and upload documents.",
    "Encryption: All documents and user data are encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard encryption protocols (e.g., AES-256).",
    "Authentication: Users must authenticate using a secure authentication protocol (e.g., OAuth 2.0) before accessing the system.",
    "Tenant isolation: Each user's documents and data are stored in a separate, isolated environment to prevent data breaches.",
    "Secure document storage: Documents are stored in a secure, access-controlled environment with regular backups and versioning."
  ],
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "The system responds to user queries within 2 seconds or less for 95% of queries.",
    "The system provides relevant and properly cited answers to user questions, with a minimum of 2 citations per answer.",
    "The system supports a question-answer workflow, allowing users to ask follow-up questions based on previous answers.",
    "The system provides a search functionality to retrieve relevant documents based on user queries, with a retrieval accuracy of 90% or higher.",
    "The system maintains an uptime expectation of 99.9% or higher, with a maximum of 1 hour of scheduled maintenance per week."
  ],
  "recommended_solution_approach": "Implement a microservices-based architecture using containerization (e.g., Docker) and orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes), with a scalable AI engine (e.g., transformer-based model) and a robust search functionality (e.g., Elasticsearch). Utilize a cloud-based infrastructure (e.g., AWS, GCP) for scalability, reliability, and maintainability.",
  "open_questions": [
    "What is the expected volume of user queries and documents to be stored?",
    "What are the specific requirements for citation formatting and style?",
    "How will user feedback be collected and incorporated into the system to improve accuracy and relevance?"
  ]
}
```

parsed_response.rephrased_requirement: Design and implement a secure, scalable, and accurate AI-powered document question-answering system, where users can upload files in supported formats (PDF, DOCX, TXT) and ask questions, receiving relevant and properly cited answers within a specified response latency of 2 seconds, with a retrieval accuracy of 90% and uptime expectation of 99.9%.
functional_requirements: Users can upload documents in supported file formats (PDF, DOCX, TXT) with a maximum file size of 10MB.
Users can ask questions related to the uploaded documents.
The system provides relevant and properly cited answers to user questions, with a minimum of 2 citations per answer.
The system supports a question-answer workflow, allowing users to ask follow-up questions based on previous answers.
The system provides a search functionality to retrieve relevant documents based on user queries.
non_functional_requirements: Response latency: 2 seconds or less for 95% of user queries.
Uptime expectation: 99.9% or higher, with a maximum of 1 hour of scheduled maintenance per week.
Retrieval accuracy: 90% or higher, measured by the relevance of retrieved documents to user queries.
Citation grounding quality: 95% or higher, measured by the accuracy of citations provided in answers.
security_requirements: Document access controls: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to ensure only authorized users can access and upload documents.
Encryption: All documents and user data are encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard encryption protocols (e.g., AES-256).
Authentication: Users must authenticate using a secure authentication protocol (e.g., OAuth 2.0) before accessing the system.
Tenant isolation: Each user's documents and data are stored in a separate, isolated environment to prevent data breaches.
Secure document storage: Documents are stored in a secure, access-controlled environment with regular backups and versioning.
acceptance_criteria: The system responds to user queries within 2 seconds or less for 95% of queries.
The system provides relevant and properly cited answers to user questions, with a minimum of 2 citations per answer.
The system supports a question-answer workflow, allowing users to ask follow-up questions based on previous answers.
The system provides a search functionality to retrieve relevant documents based on user queries, with a retrieval accuracy of 90% or higher.
The system maintains an uptime expectation of 99.9% or higher, with a maximum of 1 hour of scheduled maintenance per week.
parsed_response.recommended_solution_approach: Implement a microservices-based architecture using containerization (e.g., Docker) and orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes), with a scalable AI engine (e.g., transformer-based model) and a robust search functionality (e.g., Elasticsearch). Utilize a cloud-based infrastructure (e.g., AWS, GCP) for scalability, reliability, and maintainability.
open_questions: What is the expected volume of user queries and documents to be stored?
What are the specific requirements for citation formatting and style?
How will user feedback be collected and incorporated into the system to improve accuracy and relevance?
